title: One U.S. visa program is growing rapidly. No one is happy with it.
description: Republicans on Capitol Hill are starting to talk about one facet of immigration reform: how to expand the popular H-2A visa program for farm laborers. They face obstacles.

title: Trump leans on 'communist' messaging as economic angst drives Democrats
description: During the last election, when struggling to find a memorable attack line against Kamala Harris, Trump eventually landed on "Comrade Kamala."

title: As Sen. Mitch McConnell remains hospitalized, calls for transparency grow
description: It's been nearly four weeks since Republican Sen. Mitch McConnell was hospitalized. It's not the first time this year that a member of Congress has been absent for weeks with scant details.

title: President Trump cleans house at the bipartisan Election Assistance Commission
description: With just months until the midterms, President Trump relieved the remaining members of the U.S. Election Assistance Commission, a move condemned by Democrats and voting rights advocates.

title: Trump’s proposed triumphal arch clears another key hurdle
description: The National Capital Planning Commission, led by the president’s allies, voted to advance the project near Arlington Cemetery, tabling a height question for later.

title: Man accused of killing Charlie Kirk wished ‘he hadn’t done it,’ roommate says
description: Prosecutors laid out their case against Tyler James Robinson on Day 4 of the preliminary hearing in Utah.

title: Sens. Fetterman (D) and McCormick (R) form rare bipartisan fundraising committee
description: The unusual cross-party fundraising committee comes amid speculation that Republicans are courting John Fetterman, who has said he has no plans to switch parties.

title: Trump's arch clears another hurdle, setting up a big debate: Do height limits apply?
description: The Interior Department is arguing D.C. height limits don't apply to federal projects, bucking a century of precedent. If the panel reviewing Trump's arch agrees, experts say it could change the city.

title: Democrats seek a way forward amid finger-pointing in Maine
description: Leaders of the Maine Democratic Party are still working toward a process to replace Graham Platner, without angering his supporters.

title: With Platner announcement he's out of Senate race, Maine Democrats weigh what to do now
description: Graham Platner built a grassroots movement in Maine. As Maine Democrats weigh what's next now that he's exited the race, winning that support will be key.

title: Democratic Party fissures are shaping Michigan’s crucial Senate primary
description: The race is the next, and perhaps biggest, battle between the Democrats’ warring factions.

title: Sen. Jeanne Shaheen talks about Trump at NATO and the renewed strikes against Iran
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with New Hampshire Sen. Jeanne Shaheen about President Trump at the NATO summit and more strikes in the war with Iran.

title: A Florida airport is officially renamed for Trump. What does he stand to gain?
description: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes.

title: Campaign staffers keep trying to bet on races despite push to curb insider trading
description: Kalshi says it has blocked "dozens" of trades from campaign insiders, but experts say the company's approach leaves lots of potential loopholes. NPR has found at least one trade that slipped through.

title: Trump returns to U.S. in old Air Force One, raising questions about security
description: In a surprise switch, President Trump left Turkey in an older Air Force One plane instead of the Boeing 787 luxury jet donated by Qatar last year, raising questions about security and retrofits.

title: 9 possible candidates who could replace Platner on Maine’s ballot
description: Will Democrats choose another progressive nominee or distance themselves from Graham Platner’s wing of the party amid his scandals?

title: Maine Democrats don’t seem eager for an endorsement from Graham Platner
description: The Post asked would-be replacement candidates whether they wanted the support of Platner, under fire over a sexual assault allegation. Four responded, in the negative.

title: After Greenland bluster, Trump surprises NATO allies with praise
description: The president embraced the alliance in a meeting Wednesday, extolling member nations’ defense spending and saying nothing about the Danish territory, officials said.

title: Questions remain about defense strategy for man accused of killing Charlie Kirk
description: A preliminary hearing to establish whether there is enough evidence against Tyler James Robinson for the case to proceed to trial enters Day 3 in Utah.
